findings.evidence: `rg -n "isCompletelyMonotone_exp_neg_mul|extreme ray" TauCeti/Analysis/CompletelyMonotone/Basic.lean` shows the extremity claim only in the docstring at line 122, while the statement at line 125 is just complete monotonicity.
findings.fix: Remove the extreme-ray claim from this theorem’s docstring, or add a separate formal theorem/API proving the extremality property and document it there.
findings.issue: The docstring for `isCompletelyMonotone_exp_neg_mul` calls `t ↦ e^{-x t}` “the extreme ray of the cone of completely monotone functions,” but the declaration at lines 125-126 only proves `IsCompletelyMonotone (fun t => Real.exp (-x * t))`.

summary: One docstring overstates what the declaration proves by describing an unformalized extremality property as part of the theorem.
